name: rovia-desktop-prototype
description: Rovia Desktop pet prototype with task panel, sensor simulation, and optional Supabase sync.

scripts.check: node --check src/main/main.js && node --check src/main/backend-adapter.js && node --check src/main/backend-http-client.js && node --check src/main/state-manager.js && node --check src/main/storage.js && node --check src/main/supabase-service.js && node --check src/main/sidecar-client.js && node --check src/shared/rovia-schema.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/renderer/pet.js && node --check src/renderer/pet-blob.js && node --check src/renderer/panel.js
